title: PixelPeak Optimized
description: Official PixelPeak Modpack that guarantees the best experience on the PixelPeak Server
body:
### PixelPeak Optimized 🌟  

**PixelPeak Optimized** is the ultimate modpack for the **PixelPeak Server**, crafted to deliver stunning visuals, smooth performance, and a player-friendly experience. Perfect for explorers, builders, and adventurers alike!  

#### 🔑 Key Features:  
- ⚡ **Fast & Smooth**: Optimization mods like Sodium and Lithium and Starlight ensure high FPS and minimal lag.  
- 🎨 **Beautiful Visuals**: Optional shaders and improved textures make every biome breathtaking.  
- 🛠️ **Enhanced Gameplay**: Tools like Mouse Tweaks, JEI, and AppleSkin streamline exploring, crafting, and survival.  
- 🤝 **Multiplayer-Ready**: Includes VoiceChat and tweaks for seamless teamwork and communication.  
- 🌍 **Server-Integrated**: Fully tailored for the PixelPeak Server, ensuring compatibility and a rich community experience.  

🚀 **Join the adventure** with PixelPeak Optimized and make your time on PixelPeak unforgettable!
